use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons on landing pages and marketing sites
Keyboard-accessible interactive buttons with gradient styling
Form submission and action trigger buttons in web applications
Animated gradient buttons for visual emphasis in UI designs
ai_summary: A gradient-animated button component with a rotating color effect and rounded pill shape. Features keyboard accessibility with Enter/Space key support, disabled state handling, and customizable dimensions via width and height props. The button uses a nested pseudo-element technique with an inner span for text, creating a layered gradient effect suitable for prominent CTAs and marketing-focused interfaces.
